name: CaptureUpdateAction enum uppercase as-const literals
description: code/packages/element/src/store.ts:38-69 defines CaptureUpdateAction as 'as const' with values NEVER/IMMEDIATELY/EVENTUALLY (uppercase strings). Plan literals consistently use lowercase; Wave 4 commit c984f01 was a chore-fix to align. TypeScript const-assertion means callers must use the enum keys exactly — string literals do not widen.

name: Excalidraw v0.18 atlas-side UI slot APIs
description: Verified atlas-side UI slot APIs in v0.18: (1) renderTopLeftUI prop — injects into Excalidraw toolbar zone, verified code/packages/excalidraw/index.tsx:73,183; use for atlas tool buttons (Pin, future tools). (2) excalidrawAPI.registerAction(action) — injects into element context menu, verified types.ts:955; use for per-element contextual actions (Convert annotation). (3) Sidebar as direct child of <Excalidraw> — LayerPanel renders as direct child, toggleSidebar({name:'layers'}) at types.ts:963; Sidebar exposes Header/Tabs/Tab/Trigger subcomponents via Object.assign pattern at Sidebar.tsx:162. (4) Footer/MainMenu/WelcomeScreen — sub-components for app-wide actions. Rule: map UI need to slot before creating new surface (see atlasdraw-ui-conventions Rule 0).

content: MainMenu DefaultItems live at main-menu/DefaultItems.tsx (kebab-case path), not mainMenu/. Verified exports: LoadScene at line 66, SaveToActiveFile at line 109 of code/packages/excalidraw/components/main-menu/DefaultItems.tsx. Used as <MainMenu.DefaultItems.SaveToActiveFile />. Any plan using camelCase path mainMenu/ is wrong.

<MainMenu.DefaultItems.LoadScene> and <SaveToActiveFile> are closure-bound to internal actions — no onSelect prop. They call actionManager.executeAction(actionLoadScene/actionSaveToActiveFile) internally. Wrapping them to redirect to atlasdraw persistence is invasive. T9 pattern: add adjacent custom <MainMenu.Item> entries ('Save .atlasdraw...' / 'Open .atlasdraw...') rather than intercepting DefaultItems. v1 ergonomic gap: dual entry points in menu.
